name: Oatmeal Cocoanut Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugars until fluffy.
2. Stir in vanilla, then add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
3. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking soda (or stir them together).
4. Add to the creamed mixture.
5. Stir in rolled oats and coconut.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto well-greased baking sheets.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 15 minutes.
8. Cool on a rack.
